releaseNotes: Major release introducing multi-currency support, advanced tax automation, and redesigned invoice templates.
features: Automated VAT calculation for 12 African jurisdictions
bugFixes: Fixed PDF export timeout on large reports
Resolved duplicate invoice numbering edge case
Fixed decimal rounding in tax computations
Corrected date filtering in financial reports

releaseNotes: Patch release fixing leave balance calculation issues and improving attendance report performance.
bugFixes: Fixed leave balance calculation for part-time employees
Resolved attendance report timeout for companies > 500 employees
Fixed employee termination date not updating correctly
Corrected payslip generation for employees with multiple roles
Fixed SSO login redirect loop
Resolved email notification not sending on leave approval

releaseNotes: Minor release with pipeline automation, improved contact deduplication, and WhatsApp integration.
bugFixes: Fixed duplicate contacts appearing in search results
Resolved calendar sync issues with Google Calendar
Fixed email template rendering on Outlook
Corrected activity log timestamps to local timezone

releaseNotes: Upcoming release with Zambian ZRA integration, improved batch processing, and payslip customization.
features: Statutory deduction updates for Kenya SHIF
bugFixes: Fixed PAYE calculation for employees with multiple income sources
Resolved NSSF deduction cap not applying correctly
Fixed payroll period locking preventing amendments

releaseNotes: Emergency hotfix for stock level sync issue causing negative inventory alerts.
bugFixes: Fixed stock level sync race condition causing negative inventory
Resolved barcode scanner input validation error
Fixed warehouse transfer not updating source location

releaseNotes: Patch improving Gantt chart performance and fixing task dependency visualization issues.
bugFixes: Fixed Gantt chart freezing on projects > 200 tasks
Resolved task completion percentage not saving
Fixed resource allocation overallocation warning

releaseNotes: Minor release with expense management enhancements and vendor portal.
bugFixes: Fixed chart of accounts not exporting correctly
Resolved currency conversion rounding errors
Fixed journal entry reversal not posting

releaseNotes: Version 2.0 complete rewrite with modern UI, performance system, and AI-powered recruitment screening.
features: Complete UI overhaul with Material Design
bugFixes: Migrated all legacy data to new schema
Fixed all known performance issues from v1.x
Resolved all security vulnerabilities identified in penetration test
